summary: BTC Tools | Schedule | Verify Page UI Validation
gherkin:
When the user visits the Operator tool and logs in
Then the user should be successfully logged into the platform
When the user clicks on the BTC Tools tile
Then the user should land on the "Schedule" page
And the user should see the date format as "YYYY-MM-DD"
And the user should see a Search box. (i.e, search box can be used to search for a game via team name, Venue and GamePK)
And the user should see the team matchups (for example: SF @ PIT)
And the user validates the content of the first row includes:
Team Matchup (BOS @PIT) | Game PK | Venue | Game Date | Status
